HavenRise Realtors — Luxury Real Estate in Nairobi, Kenya

HavenRise Realtors is Nairobi's premier luxury real estate agency, specialising in exclusive off-plan and ready properties across Lavington, Westlands, Kilimani, Riverside, Runda and Kiambu. Properties from KES 6,900,000 with flexible payment plans.

📞 +254 728 686 089  |  ✉ havenriserealtors@gmail.com  |  📍 Ciata City Mall, Ridgeways, Block B, 2nd Floor, Nairobi

Off-Plan Apartments for Sale — Nairobi

  • A-One Pandora — Lavington luxury apartments, from KES 6.9M
  • Panorama West Residence — Westlands apartments
  • Balkis Residences Riverside — premium riverside apartments
  • Amethyst Springs — Kilimani luxury apartments
  • Lesto Residences — Westlands contemporary apartments

Houses & Villas for Rent — Nairobi

  • 5-bedroom house for rent — Runda, Nairobi
  • 7-bedroom Runda Acacia residence for rent
  • 4-bedroom gated home — Kiambu Road

Neighbourhoods We Serve

  • Lavington properties
  • Westlands properties
  • Kilimani properties

  • Runda properties
  • Kiambu properties

Our Services

  • Luxury property sales — off-plan and ready units
  • Premium rental listings across Nairobi

About HavenRise

Redefining
Luxury Living
in Nairobi

HavenRise Realtors is Nairobi's premier real estate agency, specialising in luxury properties and bespoke real estate solutions. We represent a carefully curated portfolio of off-plan and ready developments across Nairobi's most desirable neighbourhoods.

From the iconic A-One Pandora in Lavington to Balkis Residences in Riverside, and Amethyst Springs in Kilimani — we don't just sell properties, we curate lifestyles.

"Your home is more than four walls — it's where your story unfolds."

◈

Trust First

Every relationship we build is grounded in transparency and integrity.

◈

Curated Quality

We handpick only properties that meet our exacting standards.

◈

Client-Centred

Your goals drive every decision our agents make on your behalf.

◈

Deep Local Roots

Intimate knowledge of Nairobi's premium neighbourhoods.

Our Promise

"Every home we represent reflects our commitment to exceptional quality"

Why Choose Us

The HavenRise Difference

01

Verified Listings

Every property is thoroughly vetted and authenticated before listing.

02

24/7 Support

Round-the-clock assistance from our dedicated team of licensed professionals.

03

Transparent Pricing

Competitive, honest rates with zero hidden fees or surprise costs.

04

Flexible Payment Plans

From 20% down to flexible installments — options tailored to your budget.
